strategy_intent: Final close mein progress reinforce karna aur worth-outcome separation maintain karna.
text: Aaj tum shame-pressure mode se structured flow tak aaye ho, yeh strong shift hai. Ek phase tumhari value define nahi karta, aur kal ke anchors ready hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bas kaam karte rehna hai, placement pressure aur EMI ne machine bana diya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mild risk normalize karke Lens B se duty frame mirror karna.
text: Itna load ho toh numb feel hona natural hai, phir bhi tum duty mode mein locked ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Papa ke khet pehle hi karz mein hain, isliye bas kaam karte rehna hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mild risk soothe karke Lens D se prolonged load mirror karna.
text: Kaafi time se yeh same loop chal raha hai, month-end tak paise bhejne ka pressure bina pause.

speaker: Seeker
text: Mujhe endure karna hai, nahi toh ghar ka system hil jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens E se feared family consequence softly mirror karna.
text: Jaise tumhare slow hote hi sirf tum nahi, poora ghar slip kar jayega, yahi fear hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Log bolte hain rest le, par mere paas sochne ka time nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma cue par short restatement, Lens C se social mismatch hold karna.
text: Unki advice tumhare real load ke scale ko touch nahi karti...

speaker: Seeker
text: Mahine ke end pe paise bhejne hain, sabka vishwas tod nahi sakta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Seeker words se one grounded question puchna.
text: Jab vishwas todne ka thought aata hai, sabse heavy dar kis cheez ka hota hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Dar yahi hai ki meri slip se ghar ka system toot jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens B se duty identity mirror karna.
text: Jaise job tumhare liye sirf career nahi, ghar ka lifeline contract ban gayi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: andar se sunn ho gaya hoon
text: Haan, isi chakkar mein andar se sunn ho gaya hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: C4+Duty_Based mapping ke mutabik exhaustion reflect karna.
text: Lagta hai numbness ke neeche bahut gehri exhaustion chal rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul, rukna mana lagta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Emotion validate karke C4 reality se jodna aur worth separate karna.
text: Placement pressure, EMI aur karz ke beech numb feel karna bilkul expected hai. Tumhari keemat sirf earning pace se define nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thoda halka laga, par kal ka load fir heavy ho jata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ek baar systemic anecdote se pattern normalize karna.
text: First-gen earners mein yeh pattern bahut common hai - sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki sabko strong dikhna padta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek, ab kya karoon taaki kal collapse na ho?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Readiness ke baad 3 low-burden options dena.
text: Teen options: 4-min breathing, kal ka first 20-min task note, aur EMI/transfer reminder lock.

speaker: Seeker
text: Second aur third karunga, task note kar leta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Chosen suggestion ko stepwise execute karwana.
text: Pehle notes kholo, first task ek line mein likho, start alarm lagao, bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Done, thoda control aaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Structural reframe dekar self-blame kam karna.
text: Debt + placement overlap mein overload system response hai, personal failure verdict nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab utna heavy nahi lag raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Progress reinforce karke agency strong karna.
text: Pressure ke beech execution nikalna strong self-management hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Task list dekhte hi trigger hota hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Trigger ke liye 3 short resets dena.
text: Trigger pe 3 exhales, list ko 10-min chunks, pehla easy chunk complete.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, chunking karunga. Main theek hona chahta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Second structural reframe देना.
text: Duty-heavy phases mein micro-steps hi sustainable rehte hain, kyunki next action clear hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ab manageable lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stability acknowledge karna.
text: Yeh strong shift hai, tumne load ke beech direction pakdi rakhi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kal heavy wave aaye toh us moment koi raasta hai kya?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: In-the-moment 3 concise options dena.
text: 30-sec pause, next 10-min task pick, completion pe tick mark. Bas.

speaker: Seeker
text: 10-min reset kaam karega, ye follow karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Chosen approach reinforce karna.
text: Practical choice hai, tum pressure ko manageable units mein convert kar rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thanks, ab lag raha hai kal nikal jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Night close ke tiny anchors dena.
text: Aaj raat paani, 5-min breathing, aur kal ka first-task note visible. Bas itna.
